import React from "react"; import Topnav from "../components/Topnav"; import Footer from "../components/Footer"; // Use one of the dark blue gem backgrounds (download & place in assets/) import background from "../assets/background.png"; // e.g. from previous suggestions like blue marble / fluid sapphire function Instructions() { return ( <>
{/* Hero / Title Section */}

How to Upload Images

Follow these simple guidelines to get the most accurate gem analysis from our AI system.

{/* Main Instructions Card */}

Image Format

Please upload images in PNG or JPG format only.

Minimum Dimensions

Images must be at least 126 pixels in width and height for optimal analysis accuracy.

Best Practices

  • Use well-lit photos with clear focus on the gemstone
  • Place the gem on a plain, non-reflective background when possible
  • Avoid heavy shadows, reflections, or other objects in the frame
  • Multiple angles can help if you run several analyses
{/* Example Images Section */}

Example Gem Photos

{/* Use your own gem images or placeholders – here showing example URLs */} {[ "https://media.istockphoto.com/id/1397823124/photo/set-of-natural-colored-gemstones.webp", "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611590027211-b954fd027b51?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80", "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80", "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565372195458-9de0b320ef04?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80", ].map((src, idx) => (
